overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a student character in a wizarding school uniform descending a spiral staircase and walking through ornate gothic corridors and portrait galleries. The environment features stone architecture, warm lantern lighting, and numerous framed portraits on the walls, characteristic of a magical castle interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase with gothic stone architecture

events.description: warm wall lantern becomes visible illuminating the stone wall
character approaches the archway exit at the bottom of the staircase

agents.ego_description: character walking down a spiral staircase, holding a wand in right hand

entered.detail: stone spiral staircase with worn steps curving downward
rough-hewn stone block walls with warm lighting
black wrought iron railing with decorative patterns
smooth wooden handrail along the left wall
pointed arch window niche with statue visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow spiral staircase within a stone tower. Warm light from wall-mounted lanterns illuminates the rough stone walls and ornate metal railings. Gothic arched windows reveal statues in niches as the character approaches the bottom exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand corridor with gothic pillars and arches

events.description: exits spiral staircase into room with green patterned wallpaper
enters long grand corridor lined with stone pillars

agents.ego_description: character walks through a transitional room and proceeds down a grand corridor with gothic architecture

entered.detail: small antechamber with dark green patterned wallpaper and wooden benches
long hallway with high ceilings and repeating gothic arches
tall stone columns supporting the corridor ceiling
ornate wall-mounted lanterns providing warm ambient light
red carpet runner extending along the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the staircase into a small room with green wallpaper before entering a grand corridor. The space features tall stone pillars, ornate wall sconces, and a red carpet runner extending into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: portrait gallery with stone balustrades overlooking lower levels

events.description: enters portrait gallery area with numerous framed portraits on stone walls
exits gallery into narrower stone corridor

agents.ego_description: character walks along an upper gallery lined with portraits, then continues through stone corridors

entered.detail: upper walkway with walls densely covered in framed portraits
ornate stone railings overlooking lower levels of the castle
dozens of framed paintings covering the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a portrait gallery with stone balustrades overlooking lower levels. The walls are densely covered with framed portraits. The character continues walking through curved walkways and eventually enters a narrower stone corridor with more portraits and wall lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confined descent of a stone tower into the expansive, ornate galleries of a magical castle. It begins with the character winding down a narrow spiral staircase, where warm lantern light flickers against rough stone walls and gothic arched windows. As the character reaches the bottom, the scene shifts through a small room with green wallpaper before opening into a grand corridor defined by tall stone pillars and a long red carpet runner. The camera then glides into a portrait gallery, moving past stone balustrades and walls densely packed with framed paintings. Finally, the path curves through open walkways before narrowing into a stone corridor lined with more portraits and glowing wall lanterns.
